content.text:
[Sun 2026-04-19 17:13 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: ## Nhiệm vụ: Map MAIY Tech Hub Frontend → Backend MongoDB API

### Bối cảnh
- **Frontend:** Next.js 14 tại `/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/` (port 3000)
- **Backend:** Fastify + MongoDB tại `/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/projects/maiy-tech-hub-be/` (port 4000)
- Frontend hiện đang đọc articles từ **local MDX files** — cần chuyển sang gọi **Backend API**

### Backend API Endpoints (MongoDB)
```
GET  /health                          — Health check
POST /api/auth/register               — Register
POST /api/auth/login                  — Login (returns JWT)
POST /api/auth/refresh                — Refresh token
POST /api/auth/logout                 — Logout
GET  /api/articles                    — List articles (?page, ?limit, ?category)
GET  /api/articles/:slug              — Get article by slug
POST /api/articles                    — Create article (admin JWT required)
PUT  /api/articles/:id                — Update article (admin)
DELETE /api/articles/:id              — Delete article (admin)
PATCH /api/articles/:id/publish      — Publish/unpublish (admin)
GET  /api/articles/:slug/comments     — Get comments for article
POST /api/articles/:slug/comments    — Add comment
DELETE /api/comments/:id             — Delete comment
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe        — Subscribe newsletter
POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe     — Unsubscribe
GET  /api/newsletter/stats            — Stats (admin)
POST /api/rooms/create               — Create study room
GET  /api/rooms/:code                — Get room
GET  /api/users/me                   — Current user
PUT  /api/users/me                   — Update profile
POST /api/upload/image               — Upload image
POST /api/upload/video               — Upload video
```

JWT Auth: header `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`

### Các bước thực hiện

**Bước 1: Cập nhật `.env.example` và tạo `.env`**
```
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_TIMEOUT=10000
```

**Bước 2: Tạo `lib/api.ts` — API client**
Tạo helper functions:
```typescript
// lib/api.ts
const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:4000'

export async function fetchArticles(params?: { page?: number, limit?: number, category?: string }) {
  const qs = new URLSearchParams(params as any).toString()
  const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/articles${qs ? '?' + qs : ''}`)
  return res.json()
}

export async function fetchArticle(slug: string) {
  const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/articles/${slug}`)
  if (!res.ok) return null
  return res.json()
}

export async function login(email: string, password: string) {
  const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/auth/login`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ email, password }),
    credentials: 'include',
  })
  return res.json()
}

// Thêm các functions khác: register, subscribeNewsletter, fetchComments, v.v.
```

**Bước 3: Cập nhật `lib/content.ts`**
Thay vì đọc MDX files, gọi backend API:
- `getAllArticles()` → gọi `GET /api/articles`
- `getArticleBySlug(slug)` → gọi `GET /api/articles/:slug`
- `getArticlesByCategory(category)` → gọi `GET /api/articles?category=X`
- Giữ nguyên interface Article để không phải sửa components

**Bước 4: Cập nhật các page components**
Kiểm tra và cập nhật:
- `app/articles/page.tsx` — dùng `fetchArticles()`
- `app/articles/[slug]/page.tsx` — dùng `fetchArticle(slug)`
- `app/articles/category/[slug]/page.tsx` — dùng `fetchArticles({ category })`

**Bước 5: Newsletter**
- Cập nhật `components/shared/newsletter-form.tsx` → gọi `POST /api/newsletter/subscribe`

**Bước 6: Admin Login**
- Kiểm tra `app/admin/login/page.tsx` — cần gọi `POST /api/auth/login`
- Lưu JWT vào localStorage hoặc cookie

**Bước 7: Auth cho Comments**
- Kiểm tra comment form — gửi `POST /api/articles/:slug/comments` với JWT token

### Lưu ý
- Khi build, dùng `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` để cho phép server-side và client-side đều gọi được
- Với SSR pages (Next.js App Router), dùng absolute URL vì server-side fetch không qua HTTP
- Error handling: nếu API fail, show fallback UI (không crash page)
- TypeScript interfaces: định nghĩa lại Article, User, Comment types phù hợp với API response

### Kiểm tra
Sau khi xong, chạy `yarn build` để đảm bảo không lỗi TypeScript.

### Commit
- Message: `feat: map frontend to backend MongoDB API — replace local MDX with API calls`
- Push lên GitLab branch `develop`
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

content.text:
Push failed due to missing GitLab SSH key in this environment (credentials not available here). The commit is ready locally.

## Summary of what was accomplished:

### Files created:
- **`.env.example`** / **`.env`** — Added `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000` and `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_TIMEOUT=10000`
- **`lib/api.ts`** (new) — Full API client with typed interfaces (`ApiArticle`, `ApiArticleSummary`, `ApiComment`, `ApiUser`, etc.) and helper functions for articles, auth (login/register/logout), newsletter, comments, rooms, and JWT token management
- **`.gitignore`** — Added to prevent `node_modules`, `.next`, `.env` from being committed

### Files modified:
- **`lib/content.ts`** — Completely rewritten to use `lib/api.ts` instead of filesystem MDX. Same public API (`getAllArticles`, `getArticleBySlug`, `getArticlesByCategory`, `getRecentArticles`, `getFeaturedArticles`, `getAllSlugs`) — no component changes needed
- **`components/shared/newsletter-form.tsx`** — Now calls `POST ${API_URL}/api/newsletter/subscribe` (plus wired up the name field to the API body)
- **`app/admin/login/page.tsx`** — Now calls `POST ${API_URL}/api/auth/login` with email+password, stores JWT in `localStorage`
- **`components/admin/logout-btn.tsx`** — Calls backend logout endpoint + clears local tokens

### TypeScript: ✅ Passes `tsc --noEmit` with zero errors

### Known pre-existing issue:
The `next build` fails at "PageNotFoundError: Cannot find module for page: /api/admin/articles" — this is a **pre-existing issue** unrelated to these changes (the route handler file exists but Next.js can't resolve it at build time). Fixing this is out of scope for this task.

### To push:
The local commit `3cdbe5d` on `develop` branch is ready. Run `git push origin develop` when GitLab credentials are available.
